title: After the Japanese Oaks: An Oaken Queen?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Pant... Huff... Oh...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: I did it! I ran the entire 2,400 meters! I really did it... Wheeze...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Trainer! Thank you... so much!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Ngh... Urgh...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Phew...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After the race, Nishino Flower is so exhausted she
can't move, let alone bask in her victory.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Yes... I'm fine... Sorry... I just need... to rest a little
longer...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's completely wiped out. She must've pushed
past her limits and used every last drop in the
tank to achieve today's win.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If we continue as planned, her next race is the
Shuka Sho, another medium-distance race.
However, seeing how tired she is, I can't help but
worry.
choice_data_list:
(Carrying on like this will be hard. Instead, we
should...)

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text:
I was watching you run from up here. You were so
wonderfully fast, just like a cutting gale.

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text:
Yes. And when that blossom finally blooms, we
will face each other on the track.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That's right. Nishino Flower has a secret weapon,
and I know just the type of race she can best use
it in.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: ...Phew. Sorry for the wait. I feel a bit better now.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
...
Yes, thank you.
choice_data_list: And now, about your next race.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: ...Yes?
choice_data_list: Let's take the Shuka Sho off your schedule.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Does that mean...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: You think... I can't keep going?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's no denying she achieved something great
today. With some further adjustments, running in
the Shuka Sho would be a viable option.
However...
choice_data_list:
I think there's a stage you'd shine even brighter
on.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Shine even brighter? What do you mean?
choice_data_list: I think you should try doing sprints.
I think you should try doing sprints.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
...It's actually a relief to hear that. Honestly, I
already knew things might come to this.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
The Japanese Oaks is a big race, so I wanted to
try my best for it...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
But it was a little too much for me, and there were
times when things felt incredibly tough...
choice_data_list: Thanks for trying so hard, Flower.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Sniffle... Thank you too.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure I can perform even better in sprints, so
let's do it!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
So... what should we set as my goal? Considering
the season, should we aim for a graded race in
the summer?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her reasoning is sound. Running in one of the
many summer races of the Sprint tour is a good
way to acclimatize. But she can aim even bigger!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Huh?! But isn't that a G1 race?!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
You want me to run that right after changing
course? Not to mention there'll be senior-year
racers participating...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This will be Nishino Flower's first time running in a
race with older competitors.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Compared to them, I'm still just a kid, aren't I?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Will I even stand a chance?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's always been self-conscious of how she's
younger than her peers, so I understand why she's
worried about running against her upperclassmen.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Not as I am right now...
choice_data_list: That's why we have the summer to train.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The academy's summer camp will be starting
soon, a time during which racers tend to make
vast improvements.
choice_data_list:
I'll be right here with you, so let's get better
together!

I'll be right here with you, so let's get better
together!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: ...Okay. Then I'll follow your lead!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, we decide to make our next goal the G1
sprint, the Sprinters Stakes.
